title: Default
objective: Start the default workstream for Meeting Ingest.
status_summary: Confirmed both pending occurrence dates from transcript evidence (TRACE3 standup Happy-Monday anchor for 2026-07-20; Kushali call 21st/22nd run reference for 2026-07-22), retired the superseded low-confidence handoffs, and completed both ingests through dedicated extraction agents, validation, phase 2, archive/reconcile, and per-meeting captures, leaving the HTV inbox empty. Closed the legacy-source dedup gap fail-closed (legacy_source_unresolved, exit 12, reconcile preflight) and pushed it with the reviewed compatibility hotfix. Completed Approved Runtime Task 7 end to end: ledger 2.0 record identities and provenance trio, signal 1.2 runtime_provenance_ref with unique producer resolution at write time and in standing doctor, artifact front matter 1.1 with nested provenance and development notice, repair-date minting new generations and migrating rewritten legacy records, playbook generation-wide fingerprint binding with a scoped repair-index exemption, contract-doc example alignment plus a Generation Manifest subsection; 421 tests passing, pushed as 00a2c29 after a halted contract-deviation rework whose lesson (quote docs/artifact-contract.md in briefs) is persisted to orchestrator memory. Executed the extraction model evaluation brief same-day: controlled hash-verified comparison on two meeting types, implementer-tier lift material and transcript-verified, Decision 32 recorded and pushed raising the meeting-extraction role to the claude-implementer tier with the pin edit routed to ~/.claude, quality alias kept fixed, privacy stance reaffirmed.
blockers: No corpus adoption or mutation is authorized; a deterministic fingerprinted adoption plan requires later owner approval.
open_questions: Decide when to begin the separately planned Semantic Integrity Guardrails work after the Approved Runtime track.
next_actions: Take up Approved Runtime Task 8: replace ambiguous Claude commands with the canonical approved executable, start inbox workflows with readiness, retire the hook-based global uv tool refresh (it fired on every commit this session), and document the release flow.

Execute the Decision 32 work item in a ~/.claude agent-orchestration session: edit the meeting-extraction registry row and both extraction agent model pins to the claude-implementer tier, then run scripts/claude-md-lint.sh (fires OB-003-3).
After Tasks 1-8 pass review and an approved wheel/receipt exists, execute Task 9 HTV cutover with rollback preserved, then Task 10 fresh reference-host proof and product-truth reconciliation.
